description: Selden discusses Torque, an on-chain growth stack that enables builders to incentivize users for various actions. The platform allows for unique reward mechanisms tied to both on-chain and off-chain actions, such as distributing tokens to users joining a Telegram group. Currently in alpha, interested users can apply for the waitlist.
topic_summary: Torque provides a platform for rewarding users through innovative token distribution methods, enhancing user engagement and protocol growth [t=0:16-0:39].
